testcase.name: 3170-concept-relationship-node-generations-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Generations Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with different numbers of generations

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a generations = 1
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A single generation of descendants is specified, so only the relationship source and its immediate children are included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a generations = 1, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A single generation of descendants is specified, so only the relationship source and its immediate children are included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with generations > 1
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. Two generations of descendants are specified, so the relationship source, its immediate children and grand-children are included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with generations > 1, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. Two generations of descendants are specified, so the relationship source, its immediate children and grand-children are included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with generations = 0
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. The number of generations of descendants is specified as zero, so the relationship source and all its descendants are is included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with generations = 0, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. The number of generations of descendants is specified as zero, so the relationship source and all its descendants are is included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = child and generations > 1
variation.description: Invalid table that has a concept-relationship node with 'child' as its formulaAxis and generations = 2 (if generations is specified in combination with 'child' it must be 1).

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a generations expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the number of generations of children using an XPath expression. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a generations expression, with instance
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the number of generations of children using an XPath expression.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an invalid generations expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the number of generations of children using an XPath expression that does not evaluate to a valid value from the enumeration.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a negative generations expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the number of generations of children using an XPath expression that evaluates to a negative number.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a generations expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the number of generations of children using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of values.
